function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-11-03
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-03                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md` by adding YAML frontmatter using the finance invoice schema, preserved the full original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, kept the diff focused, and then deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS.md files for entered folders, used schema-defined invoice fields only, preserved original body exactly per migration discipline, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion per inbox workflow update.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR-structure the target invoice with YAML frontmatter per schema while preserving body text. The target note contained all required invoice fields and line items visible in its body, enabling exact extraction without guessing. File update succeeded, then inbox item was removed per `process-next-inbox-item.md` and `inbox-processing-v2-update.md`.
